top_findings.title: init_db() never called — running service 500s on first request (no 'books' table)
top_findings.evidence: app.py:38 defines init_db() but it is called nowhere; __main__ (app.py:272-275) only runs app.run(). On a fresh books.db the table is never created, so GET/POST /books raise sqlite3.OperationalError: no such table: books. Tests pass only because test_app.py:31 creates the schema itself and monkey-patches get_db.
top_findings.suggestion: Call init_db() inside an app context at startup (e.g. with app.app_context(): init_db()) before app.run().
